name: smart-dms
description: Local AI-powered document management system with OCR, search, metadata extraction, and review workflows.
author: Pascal Bossert

scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:web
scripts.test: pnpm run test:shared && pnpm run test:api && pnpm run test:web
scripts.test:cov: pnpm --filter @smart-dms/shared-dto test -- --coverage && pnpm --filter backend test:cov && pnpm --filter web test:cov
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter backend test:e2e && pnpm --filter web test:e2e
